title: Vasteras Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Vasteras with a Z-Score of -3.17. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vasteras are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.1 GG, indicating a substantial demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 80% and the wind speed is moderate at 11.2 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme weather event.
